title: Portable analytical equipment
abstract: Portable analytical equipment, systems, methods, and techniques related thereto is disclosed. Portable analytical equipment can comprise a controller and a probe. The probe can interrogate a sample and receive a response. The controller can cause an analysis related to the interrogation. The analysis can be selected from a portfolio of analyses. The controller can analyze the response to the interrogation based on reference data. The controller can determine an indication based on the analyzing the response for presentation via a low-power interface, which can comprise an LED or electrophoretic element. The controller can further be connected to an external device, e.g., a smartphone or remote PC, to present collected data and the analyzing of the response to the interrogation. The disclosed subject matter can be employed in hand-held analytical equipment, e.g., a hand-held Raman spectrometer.
claims: Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. A device, comprising: a controller portion, comprising: a processor; and a memory that stores executable instructions that, when executed by the processor, facilitate performance of operations, comprising: selecting an analysis profile related to performing an optical interrogation of a sample; initiating the optical interrogation based on the analysis profile; receiving an optical response to the optical interrogation of the sample; in response to analyzing the optical response, determining a result of the optical interrogation of the sample; and indicating a condition related to the sample, via a condition indicator portion of the controller portion, based on the result of the optical interrogation of the sample; and a probe portion, comprising: an optical interface configured to perform the optical interrogation of the sample. 2. The device of claim 1 , wherein the condition indicator portion comprises a light emitting diode (LED) for indicating the condition. 3. The device of claim 2, wherein the LED emits a first color for indicating a first condition and a second color for indicating a second condition. 4. The device of claim 1 , wherein the condition indicator portion comprises a plurality of LEDs, and a combination of emitting and non-emitting LEDs of the plurality of LEDs indicates the condition. 5. The device of claim 1, wherein the condition indicator portion comprises an electrophoretic element for indicating the condition. 6. The device of claim 1 , wherein the selecting the analysis profile is selected from a portfolio of analyses, comprising the analysis profile, stored in the memory of the device to facilitate conducting different optical analyses. 7. The device of claim 6, wherein the analysis profile is updateable in the portfolio of analyses stored in the memory of the device. 8. The device of claim 1, wherein the analyzing the optical response comprises receiving a known optical spectrum. 9. The device of claim 8, wherein the known optical spectrum is stored in the memory of the device. 10. The device of claim 1, wherein the optical interface comprises a spherical or generally spherical lens element at an interface to the sample. 11. The device of claim 1 , wherein the probe portion is at least partially retractable into a handle portion of the device. 12. The device of claim 1, wherein the controller portion communicates the result of the optical interrogation to a user equipment distinct from the device. 13. The device of claim 1, wherein the initiating the optical interrogation of the sample is in response to receiving user input to the device. 14. The device of claim 1, wherein the initiating the optical interrogation of the sample is in response to determining that the condition related to the sample has changed. 15. The device of claim 1, wherein the initiating the optical interrogation of the sample is in response to receiving a trigger signal from another device. 16. The device of claim 1, wherein the optical interrogation comprises Raman spectrometry. 17. A system, comprising: a portable optical analysis device, comprising: a controller portion that performs an optical interrogation of a sample; a result indicator portion that indicates a result of the optical interrogation; and a probe portion that in-situ optically interrogates the sample; and an interface device, distinct from the portable optical analysis device, comprising: a display that displays at least a portion of the result of the optical interrogation; a user interface that enables modification of a parameter of the portable optical analysis device; and a wireless radio that enables communication between the interface device and the portable optical analysis device. 18. The system of claim 17, wherein the portable optical analysis device comprises a memory or a removable storage device communicatively coupled to the controller portion. 19. The system of claim 18, wherein the controller portion of the portable optical analysis device receives information related to one or more reference optical spectra stored on the memory or the removable storage device. 20. The system of claim 18, wherein the controller portion of the portable optical analysis device is configured to access one or more optical analysis profiles stored on the memory or the removable storage device. 21. The system of claim 18, wherein a reference optical spectra or an optical analysis profile stored on the memory or the removable storage device is updated via the interface device. 22. The system of claim 21, wherein the update via the interface device comprises a wireless connection between the portable optical analysis device and the wireless radio of the interface device. 23. The system of claim 21, wherein the update via the interface device comprises a wired connection between the portable optical analysis device and the interface device. 24. The system of claim 17, wherein the result indicator portion comprises at least one LED and the at least one LED enables the portable optical analysis device to indicate a result of the optical interrogation of the sample via a color of an emission from the at least one LED or a pattern of emissions and non-emissions for the at least one LED. 25. A computer readable storage device comprising executable instructions that, in response to execution, cause a system comprising a processor to perform operations, comprising: selecting an analysis profile related to performing an optical interrogation of a sample via an optical interface configured to perform the optical interrogation of the sample; initiating the optical interrogation based on the analysis profile; receiving an optical response to the optical interrogation of the sample; in response to analyzing the optical response, determining a result of the optical interrogation of the sample; and indicating a condition related to the sample, via a condition indicator portion of the controller portion, based on the result of the optical interrogation of the sample. 26. The computer readable storage device of claim 25, wherein the selecting an analysis profile comprises performing the optical interrogation of the sample via an in-situ optical interface. 27. The computer readable storage device of claim 25, wherein the selecting an analysis profile comprises performing the optical interrogation comprising Ramen spectrometry. 28. The computer readable storage device of claim 25, wherein the selecting the analysis profile is selected from a portfolio of analyses, comprising the analysis profile, stored in a memory to facilitate conducting different optical analyses.
